headline: $700 Billion and Most Investors Are Watching The Wrong Companies

headline: Software Strikes Back - Dell Detonates, Abel Finally Spends, Nvidia Aims at the PC
summary: A computer maker most investors had filed under "boring hardware" jumped a third in one session. The Dow crossed 51,000 for the first time. And over the weekend, Greg Abel finally did the thing the market had been waiting for, he wrote an $8.5 billion cheque. Three storylines, three different signals, all worth pulling apart before Monday's open.

Three storylines, three different signals, all worth pulling apart before Monday's open.
